name: gbrain
description: Personal knowledge brain with hybrid RAG search — GStack mod for agent platforms

skills.name: ingest
skills.description: Route content to specialized ingestion skills. Detects input type and delegates.

skills.name: query
skills.description: Answer questions using 3-layer search, synthesis, and citation propagation

skills.name: maintain
skills.description: Brain health checks: back-link enforcement, citation audit, filing validation, stale info, orphans, benchmarks

skills.name: enrich
skills.description: Enrich pages with tiered enrichment protocol, person/company page templates, and validation rules

skills.name: briefing
skills.description: Compile daily briefing with meeting context, active deals, and citation tracking

skills.name: migrate
skills.description: Universal migration from Obsidian, Notion, Logseq, markdown, CSV, JSON, Roam

skills.name: obsidian-gbrain-safe-index
skills.description: Connect and sync an Obsidian-style Markdown vault with gbrain using a cost-controlled import-first workflow, explicit embedding gates, and durable skill/workflow capture.

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Set up GBrain: auto-provision Supabase or PGLite, AGENTS.md injection, first import

skills.name: publish
skills.description: Share brain pages as beautiful password-protected HTML (code + skill pair, zero LLM calls)

skills.name: frontmatter-guard
skills.description: Validate and auto-repair YAML frontmatter on brain pages; gates against malformed YAML, missing closing ---, nested quotes, slug mismatches, null bytes

skills.name: signal-detector
skills.description: Always-on ambient signal capture. Fires on every message to detect original thinking and entity mentions.

skills.name: brain-ops
skills.description: Brain-first lookup, read-enrich-write loop, source attribution, ambient enrichment. The core read/write cycle.

skills.name: capture
skills.description: Single human-facing entrypoint for ingestion. Routes through put_page (local) or MCP (thin-client); replaces put-page-vs-commit-vs-autopilot confusion with one verb.

skills.name: idea-ingest
skills.description: Ingest links, articles, tweets, and ideas into the brain with analysis and entity cross-linking.

skills.name: media-ingest
skills.description: Ingest video, audio, PDF, book, screenshot, and repo content with entity extraction.

skills.name: meeting-ingestion
skills.description: Ingest meeting transcripts with attendee enrichment, entity propagation, and timeline merge.

skills.name: citation-fixer
skills.description: Audit and fix citation formatting across brain pages.

skills.name: repo-architecture
skills.description: Where new brain files go. Filing rules and directory conventions.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create new skills following the conformance standard with MECE validation.

skills.name: daily-task-manager
skills.description: Task lifecycle: add, complete, defer, remove, review with priority levels.

skills.name: daily-task-prep
skills.description: Morning preparation with calendar context, open threads, and task review.

skills.name: cross-modal-review
skills.description: Quality gate via second model with refusal routing chain.

skills.name: cron-scheduler
skills.description: Schedule management with staggering, quiet hours, and wake-up override.

skills.name: reports
skills.description: Save and load timestamped reports with keyword routing for fast lookup.

skills.name: testing
skills.description: Skill validation framework: frontmatter, sections, manifest coverage, MECE checks.

skills.name: soul-audit
skills.description: 6-phase interactive interview generating SOUL.md, USER.md, ACCESS_POLICY.md, HEARTBEAT.md.

skills.name: webhook-transforms
skills.description: Convert external events into brain-ingestible signals with entity extraction.

skills.name: data-research
skills.description: Structured data research: search, extract, archive, deduplicate, track. Parameterized YAML recipes for investor updates, donations, company metrics.

skills.name: minion-orchestrator
skills.description: Unified Minions skill for deterministic shell jobs and LLM subagent orchestration. Submit, monitor, steer, pause/resume, replay. Replaces the older gbrain-jobs routing intent and sessions_spawn for durable observable background work.

skills.name: schema-author
skills.description: Evolve the active schema pack. Add page types, propose new types from a corpus scan, backfill page.type via sync. Wraps the 14 gbrain schema CLI verbs + 9 MCP ops shipped in v0.40.7.0.

skills.name: skillify
skills.description: Meta skill. Turn any raw feature into a properly-skilled, tested, resolvable, evaled unit. Paired with gbrain check-resolvable gives user-controllable auto-skill-creation.

skills.name: skillpack-check
skills.description: Agent-readable gbrain health report. Wraps doctor + apply-migrations --list into one JSON blob with exit codes. Cron-friendly for morning-briefing pipelines.

skills.name: skillpack-harvest
skills.description: Editorial workflow for lifting a proven skill from a host repo back into gbrain. Pairs with `gbrain skillpack harvest` CLI. Drives the genericization checklist that scrubs fork-specific names + real entities before files land in gbrain core.

skills.name: smoke-test
skills.description: Post-restart smoke tests + auto-fix for gbrain and OpenClaw environments

skills.name: gbrain-upgrade
skills.description: Keep gbrain current: act on the UPGRADE_AVAILABLE marker per self_upgrade.mode (notify prompt or silent auto)

skills.name: book-mirror
skills.description: Take any book (EPUB/PDF), produce a personalized chapter-by-chapter analysis with two-column tables: left = chapter summary, right = how it applies to you based on brain context. Output: brain page + PDF.

skills.name: article-enrichment
skills.description: Transform raw article text dumps in the brain into structured pages with executive summaries, verbatim quotes, key insights, why-it-matters, and cross-references.

skills.name: strategic-reading
skills.description: Read a book/article/case study through the lens of a specific strategic problem; produce an applied playbook (do/avoid/watch for) with short/medium/long-term recommendations.

skills.name: concept-synthesis
skills.description: Deduplicate and synthesize raw concept stubs into a tiered intellectual map (T1 Canon to T4 Riff), tracing idea evolution across sources over time.

skills.name: idea-lineage
skills.description: Trace one idea's evolution through the brain: first mention, best articulation, reversals, contradictions, abandoned branches, related concepts, and current live version.

skills.name: perplexity-research
skills.description: Brain-augmented web research via Perplexity plus Opus; surfaces what is NEW vs already-known about a topic by cross-referencing against the brain first.

skills.name: archive-crawler
skills.description: Universal archivist for personal file archives (Dropbox/B2/email exports). Filters for high-value content within an explicit gbrain.yml allow-list scan_paths gate.

skills.name: academic-verify
skills.description: Verify academic citations and research claims against current literature; routes through perplexity-research for the actual web search and formats results as a citation-checked brain page.

skills.name: brain-pdf
skills.description: Generate a publication-quality PDF from any brain page via the gstack make-pdf binary; strips frontmatter, sanitizes emoji, applies running headers.

skills.name: voice-note-ingest
skills.description: Ingest voice notes with exact-phrasing preservation (never paraphrased); routes content based on a decision tree across originals/concepts/people/companies/ideas/personal/voice-notes.

skills.name: cold-start
skills.description: Day-one brain bootstrapping: sequence the highest-leverage data sources (contacts, calendar, email, conversations, social, archives) to go from empty brain to useful brain. Uses ClawVisor for safe credential handling — agents never hold raw API keys.

skills.name: ask-user
skills.description: Reusable choice-gate pattern for presenting users with 2-4 options and stopping execution until they respond. Platform-agnostic (Telegram buttons, Discord, CLI, OpenClaw clarify tool).

skills.name: functional-area-resolver
skills.description: Compress an agent's routing file (RESOLVER.md or AGENTS.md) by replacing skill-per-row tables with functional-area dispatcher entries. Two-layer dispatch keeps every sub-skill reachable at ~50% of the file size.

skills.name: gbrain-advisor
skills.description: Proactive 'make the most of gbrain' coaching. Runs gbrain advisor on a cadence and pings the user with the top high-leverage actions for their brain. Read-only; always asks before fixing.

skills.name: brain-taxonomist
skills.description: Filing gate consulted before every brain page write. Reads the active schema pack via `gbrain schema show --json`; emits a recommended filing path with reasoning.

skills.name: eiirp
skills.description: Everything In Its Right Place — post-work organizer. 7-phase audit: inventory, taxonomy, schema check (via cathedral CLI), file, skill graph audit, verify, report.

skills.name: schema-unify
skills.description: Migrate a brain off a noisy 24+-type pack onto gbrain-base-v2 (15 canonical types). 7-phase workflow: brain → assess → propose → apply → sync → verify → commit. Wraps the v0.41.22 unify-types PROTECTED Minion handler.

skills.name: skill-optimizer
skills.description: Self-evolving skill optimization via gbrain skillopt — SkillOpt-paper-grounded text-space optimizer with validation gating (median-of-3 + epsilon=0.05), bundled-skill safety, bootstrap review sentinel, per-skill DB lock, and atomic versioned writes.

skills.name: skill-vault-capture-policy
skills.description: Capture durable operational learnings, new agent skills, and environment/setup changes into the Obsidian vault instead of transient chat memory.

skills.name: caveman
skills.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode that cuts output tokens ~65% while keeping full technical accuracy. Levels: lite/full/ultra/wenyan.

skills.name: context-mode
skills.description: Route large/uncertain command, file, and API output through context-mode sandbox tools (ctx_execute, ctx_search) to keep raw data out of the context window.

skills.name: shadcn
skills.description: Manage shadcn/ui components and projects: add/search/fix/style/compose UI and component registries. Triggers on shadcn/ui, presets, --preset, components.json.

skills.name: impeccable
skills.description: Frontend design critique, audit, polish, and live browser iteration. Covers UX, accessibility, typography, color, layout, motion, and design-system tokens.

skills.name: awesome-design-md
skills.description: Read-only corpus of 70+ real product DESIGN.md specs (Stripe, Linear, Vercel, Apple, Supabase...) for reference-driven, brand-matched frontend design.

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Guidance for distinctive, intentional visual design of new or reshaped UI — aesthetic direction, typography, and non-templated choices.

skills.name: banner-design
skills.description: "Design banners for social media, ads, website heroes, creative assets, and print. Multiple art direction options with AI-generated visuals.

skills.name: brand
skills.description: Brand voice, visual identity, messaging frameworks, asset management, brand consistency. Activate for branded content, tone of voice, market

skills.name: design
skills.description: "Comprehensive design skill: brand identity, design tokens, UI styling, logo generation (55 styles, Gemini AI), corporate identity program (

skills.name: design-system
skills.description: Token architecture, component specifications, and slide generation. Three-layer tokens (primitive→semantic→component), CSS variables, spacin

skills.name: slides
skills.description: Create strategic HTML presentations with Chart.js, design tokens, responsive layouts, copywriting formulas, and contextual slide strategies.

skills.name: ui-styling
skills.description: Create beautiful, accessible user interfaces with shadcn/ui components (built on Radix UI + Tailwind), Tailwind CSS utility-first styling, a

skills.name: ui-ux-pro-max
skills.description: "UI/UX design intelligence for web and mobile. Includes 50+ styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 161 product types, 99 UX guideline

skills.name: gsap-performance
skills.description: Official GSAP skill for performance — prefer transforms, avoid layout thrashing, will-change, batching. Use when optimizing GSAP animations,

skills.name: gsap-plugins
skills.description: Official GSAP skill for GSAP plugins — registration, ScrollToPlugin, ScrollSmoother, Flip, Draggable, Inertia, Observer, SplitText, Scramble

skills.name: gsap-scrolltrigger
skills.description: Official GSAP skill for ScrollTrigger — scroll-linked animations, pinning, scrub, triggers. Use when building or recommending scroll-based a

skills.name: minimalist-skill
skills.description: Clean editorial-style interfaces. Warm monochrome palette, typographic contrast, flat bento grids, muted pastels. No gradients, no heavy sha

skills.name: brutalist-skill
skills.description: Raw mechanical interfaces fusing Swiss typographic print with military terminal aesthetics. Rigid grids, extreme type scale contrast, utilit

setup.description: Auto-provision Supabase or PGLite and configure GBrain (< 2 min)
